title: Miami Heat Wave
lead: Miami is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.74. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, posing a significant threat to its residents.
body:
The current heat wave in Miami has a score of 10.0/10, indicating a severe anomaly. The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 12.1 GG, which is extremely high.
 The relative humidity is at 67%, and the wind speed is at 17.7 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive.
 The city's infrastructure is under strain, with the Heat Wave having a significant impact on various sectors.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the heat wave's effects.
